query:
-- Do Zambrero Telstra customers have ANY billing items?
SELECT 
  bi.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.category,
  bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C2785','C1404','C1406','C0357','C0344','C0370','C0323','C0369','C0385','C1407','C0298','C0349')
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Do Zambrero Telstra customers have ANY billing items?
SELECT 
  bi.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.category,
  bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C2785','C1404','C1406','C0357','C0344','C0370','C0323','C0369','C0385','C1407','C0298','C0349')
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;
